languages.text: Вы запретили установку церебрального аугмента солдату-пустотнику.
You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.
languages.original_text: Вы запретили установку церебрального аугмента солдату-пустотнику.

traits.locale_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.
You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.
You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

languages.text: Te negaste a permitir que se instalara un aumético cerebral en un soldado de la nave insignia.
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: Te negaste a permitir que se instalara un aumético cerebral en un soldado de la nave insignia.

languages.text: 你拒绝为一名旗舰士兵安装脑部植入物。
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: 你拒绝为一名旗舰士兵安装脑部植入物。

languages.text: Vous avez refusé l'implantation d'un augmétique cérébral dans le corps d'un soldat du vaisseau amiral.
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez refusé l'implantation d'un augmétique cérébral dans le corps d'un soldat du vaisseau amiral.

languages.text: Bir sancak gemisi askerine beyin ogmentiği takılmasına izin vermedin.
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: Bir sancak gemisi askerine beyin ogmentiği takılmasına izin vermedin.

languages.text: Du hast die Installation einer Zerebralaugmentation in einen Soldaten des Flaggschiffs nicht erlaubt.
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: Du hast die Installation einer Zerebralaugmentation in einen Soldaten des Flaggschiffs nicht erlaubt.

languages.text: 旗艦兵に脳拡張装置の設置を許可することを拒否した。
languages.original_text: You refused to allow the installation of a cerebral augmetic in a flagship soldier.

traits.locale_text: 旗艦兵に脳拡張装置の設置を許可することを拒否した。
